calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Devin P. Whiteford, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, GOGRID, LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant TODACELL, Inc. aka TODACELL, LTD.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Simon Tam sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $73,461.53
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,335.08
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $515.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $76,311.61

Judgment signed in open court.
